# Ahmed Abdelgwad — Frontend & React Developer

## Who is Ahmed?
Ahmed Abdelgwad is a professional web developer and frontend specialist based in Egypt with 2+ years of experience building high-performance, visually stunning web applications. He is available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities.

## Skills & Expertise
- React.js, Next.js, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Glassmorphism UI
- Node.js, Prisma, MongoDB
- SEO optimization, Core Web Vitals, web performance
- SaaS dashboards, e-commerce platforms, real estate portals
- Interactive social platforms with real-time chat

## Services Offered
1. E-commerce platforms — fast, secure, conversion-optimized
2. E-learning platforms — interactive with video, quizzes, dashboards
3. Real estate portals — smart filters, maps, property listings
4. SaaS dashboards — complex data visualization, role-based access
5. Landing pages — premium design that converts visitors to clients
6. Social platforms — real-time chat rooms, notifications, feeds

## Why Choose Ahmed?
Ahmed combines luxury visual design (smooth animations, glassmorphism, premium UX) with blazing-fast technical performance and clean SEO-optimized code. His sites load in under 1 second and rank well on Google.
